name: Scallops Saute
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Chablis OR Dry White Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the scallops in cold water; drain and set aside.
2. Coat a large skillet with cooking spray and add margarine. Place over medium-high heat until the margarine melts.
3. Add snow peas and celery to the skillet. Saute 1 minute or until crisp-tender.
4. Remove vegetables from the skillet using a slotted spoon and set aside.
5. Add scallops, white wine, lemon juice, dillweed, and pepper to the skillet. Bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Cover; reduce heat and simmer for 5 to 6 minutes or until scallops are done.
7. Add the reserved vegetables and cook just until thoroughly heated.
8. Sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley and serve with a slotted spoon. Serve with angel hair pasta with pimiento, spinach-radicchio salad, and bread sticks.
